TO SERVE AND PROTECT Even in the thirty-first century; crime iS fact of life Though they go by various names ad wear various uniforms all societies in known space require police forces that share common skills and goals. Service on police torce can be every bit as dangerous as on the front lines in Mech. TOUR Of DUTY: INNER SPHERE From lofty MechWarrior to common grunt; this path where you put it all on the line Combat and non-combat mili- tary personnel alike must face the enemy in one r more tours duty.
